arts.ttl: Man Utd vs Leicester predictions: Van Nistelrooy to bow out in style
arts.sum: Interim Manchester United manager Ruud van Nistelrooy will take charge of Manchester United for the final time on Sunday and Tom Hill expects his side to prove too good for Leicester at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel replacing Erik ten Hag at Man United was 'basically done', agent reveals... and he claims the German boss SHOULD have picked Old Trafford over England
arts.sum: Although he failed to win any silverware with Bayern, Tuchel delivered three titles - including the Champions League - for Chelsea, where he was in charge from January 2021 to September 2022.

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo sends message to Ruben Amorim ahead of Man Utd arrival
arts.sum: Amad Diallo has been in and out of Man Utd's side as he competes for a starting place against the likes of Marcus Rashford, Alejandro Garnacho and Antony.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy looking to end Man Utd caretaker stint on high against Foxes
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is taking over as head coach on Monday.

arts.ttl: Zinedine Zidane finally moves closer to dream job after missing out on Man Utd role
arts.sum: Zinedine Zidane has been out of work since leaving Real Madrid for a second time in 2021, but the Frenchman is now edging closer to a return to the dugout having been overlooked by Manchester United

arts.ttl: Dimitar Berbatov regrets keeping mental health struggle private as ex-Man Utd star calls for change
arts.sum: Former Manchester United striker Dimitar Berbatov admits he has become "more mature" about mental health after keeping things hidden during his time at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Brighton make visit as Steve Cooper opens up on Facundo Buonanotte transfer talk
arts.sum: As one of City’s best performers so far this season, and given he’s still only 19 and so has great scope to improve, many supporters will be hoping Buonanotte's time at the club does not end when his loan deal expires next summer. Steve Cooper will treat Facundo Buonanotte as if he’s a permanent Leicester City player – even if a transfer never materialises.

arts.ttl: Amad decision and Alejandro Garnacho benched - predicted Manchester United line up vs Leicester
arts.sum: Man Utd return to Premier League action against Leicester this weekend, so what could their starting XI look like?

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy tells Ruben Amorim which Man Utd problem he must immediately solve
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy takes charge of his final Manchester United game as interim manager against Leicester on Sunday and admits that solving the squad's goalscoring woes is a vital issue

arts.ttl: Ex-Man United chief scout confirms transfer interest as Victor Lindelof claim emerges
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news and gossip includes an update on Chris Rigg and Victor Lindelof
